description_long: This object is a white Nintendo Wii console standing vertically on a gray base, with a game disc partially ejected from the front slot. The front face features a vertical disc slot illuminated by a blue light, along with several rectangular buttons and indicator lights. The rear side is equipped with multiple ventilation grilles, USB ports, and other connection interfaces. The left and right sides are smooth and unadorned, with the left side showing the disc partially out of the slot. The disc itself is labeled with blue graphics and the text 'Mario Kart Wii.' The overall design is sleek, compact, and primarily constructed from plastic with some metallic and electronic components inside.
description: A white Nintendo Wii console with a gray base and a Mario Kart Wii disc partially ejected from the illuminated front slot. The device features ports, buttons, and a sleek, modern design.
description_view_0: The left side of the console is visible, showing the Mario Kart Wii disc partially ejected from the front slot and the smooth, angled surface of the device.
description_view_1: The rear of the console displays ventilation grilles, USB ports, and other connection interfaces, with the disc edge visible protruding from the front.
description_view_2: The right side of the console is shown, featuring a smooth, unadorned surface with no visible ports or buttons.
description_view_3: The front of the console is visible, highlighting the vertical disc slot with blue illumination, control buttons, and the Mario Kart Wii disc partially ejected.
